text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship is cool as a cucumber right before the
Kikuka Sho, the longest of the Classic races.
Maybe a little too cool.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she leisurely sips tea and munches on crackers,
I can't help but be concerned about how she'll do
in the race proper.
